name: sync-theme
description: Chrome extension that switches Slack and Grafana between light and dark to match your system theme.

scripts.icons: for s in 16 32 48 128; do magick -background none icons/icon.svg -resize ${s}x${s} icons/icon-${s}.png; done
scripts.package: rm -f sync-theme.zip && zip -r sync-theme.zip manifest.json icons src -x '*.DS_Store'
